narrative: All 19 required checks pass on the first requirements iteration. The artifact contains 28 requirements across 5 types (11F, 4NFR, 4BR, 5C, 4S), covering all 5 Desired Outcomes, all active Known Constraints, and all Problem Statement aspects. Four open issues remain for business owner confirmation before or during the human gate review.

source_findings.finding: 'All Macquarie entities' is undefined — entity perimeter not specified in intent
source_findings.rationale: Interpreted as Macquarie Tax Consolidation Group + designated material foreign subsidiaries in TRCS; architect must confirm entity perimeter before design phase

source_findings.finding: CbCR scope ambiguity — intent does not distinguish data production from ATO e-lodgement
source_findings.rationale: Interpreted as data extract + schema validation only; ATO lodgement placed out of scope; business owner must confirm

source_findings.finding: 'Monthly close window' not numerically defined in intent
source_findings.rationale: T+3 business days derived from integration landscape constraint on the general ledger; assumption documented in §1.1 A-002

process_gaps.finding: No check verifies that Open Issues in §10 are resolved before human gate approval
process_gaps.recommended_action: Add advisory note to human gate guidance: lead architect should confirm all Open Issues are resolved or explicitly deferred to design before approving the requirements phase

process_gaps.finding: AI-IR-007 does not distinguish between Known Constraints requiring REQ-C/S treatment vs design-phase-only constraints
process_gaps.recommended_action: Refine AI-IR-007 guidance: classify each Known Constraint as 'requires requirements treatment' vs 'design-phase constraint only' before checking coverage
